hero_tagline: Your companion for reading and memorizing the Holy Quran
feature_quran_desc: Read the Holy Quran in beautiful Uthmanic script, fully offline
feature_hifz_desc: Track your memorization progress juz by juz, page by page
feature_wird_desc: Set daily page goals and track your consistency with reminders
feature_tikrar_desc: Memorize verses through structured repetition with audio recitation
feature_search_desc: Find any surah or verse by Arabic text or surah name
feature_bookmarks_desc: Save and organize verses for easy reference
tasmi_desc: AI-powered recitation verification — recite from memory and the app checks your accuracy
privacy_subtitle: No accounts. No tracking. No ads.
privacy_offline_desc: The complete Quran is stored on your device
privacy_no_data_desc: We never collect or transmit personal data
privacy_open_source_desc: Our code is available for everyone on GitHub
download_subtitle: Completely free, no ads, no subscriptions
contact_heading: Got an idea to make Rattil better?
contact_desc: We'd love to hear from you — whether it's a feature request, feedback, or just a hello.
privacy_overview: Rattil is a free, offline-first Quran reading app. Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how Rattil handles your data.
privacy_collection: Rattil does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. The app does not require an account, login, or any form of user identification.
privacy_storage_intro: All app data is stored locally on your device, including:
privacy_storage_outro: This data never leaves your device and is not accessible to us or any third party.
privacy_third_party_intro: Rattil connects to the following third-party services solely to fetch Quran content:
privacy_third_party_outro: These connections are read-only. No user data is sent to these services. Only content requests (surah/verse identifiers) are transmitted to retrieve the requested commentary or audio.
privacy_analytics: Rattil does not use any analytics, tracking, or telemetry services. There are no third-party SDKs that collect user data.
privacy_children: Rattil does not collect any personal information from anyone, including children under the age of 13.
privacy_changes: If we update this privacy policy, the changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacy_contact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue at {github} or email {email}.
terms_acceptance: By downloading, installing, or using Rattil, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.
terms_license: Rattil is open-source software licensed under the terms of its repository. You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the app for personal, non-commercial purposes.
terms_content: The Quran text displayed in Rattil is sourced from established Islamic databases. Commentary (Tafseer) and audio recitation are fetched from third-party APIs. We do not claim ownership of this content and are not responsible for its accuracy.
terms_availability: Rattil is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. Core features (Quran reading, bookmarks, memorization tracking) work offline. Features requiring internet (Tafseer, audio recitation) depend on third-party service availability.
terms_liability: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Rattil and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app.
terms_modifications: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms_contact: For questions about these terms, please reach out at {email}.
footer_dedication: An ongoing charity for my mother and all Muslim mothers — may Allah have mercy on them
footer_tagline: Your companion for reading and memorizing the Holy Quran.
footer_tagline_long: A free, open-source app for reading and memorizing the Holy Quran. Works offline, supports 44 languages, with no accounts, no tracking, and no ads.
